description: Canonical pibo tui:sessions PTY scenarios that validate the real default CLI path with mocked provider output and optional bounded real-provider smoke.

userStories.title: Add mocked-provider injection seam for CLI Session UI scenario
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want deterministic assistant output for pibo tui:sessions so that the canonical PTY scenario does not require live provider credentials.
acceptanceCriteria: Define a narrow mocked provider or deterministic source injection seam for pibo tui:sessions PTY scenarios
Mocked mode can return a deterministic assistant response to a test message
Mocked mode does not require external network access or real provider credentials
Provider/mock setup details are recorded in artifacts when available
Focused mocked provider/source tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create canonical host pibo tui:sessions scenario
userStories.description: As an implementation agent, I want a canonical PTY scenario for pibo tui:sessions so that I validate the real default path instead of demo mode only.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a canonical scenario that runs pibo tui:sessions without --demo under PTY on host
Scenario waits for startup, creates or opens a controlled test session, sends Hi, waits for deterministic assistant output, runs /status, and exits with /quit
Scenario uses terminal-safe per-character typing for user commands
Scenario asserts transcript text, assistant output, status/session details, and clean exit or controlled termination
PTY scenario passes in mocked/deterministic mode on host
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Verify agent/profile visibility in CLI Session UI scenario
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I want the canonical scenario to catch missing custom/test agents so that runtime registry regressions are visible.
acceptanceCriteria: Scenario verifies configured test profile or pibo-agent visibility when fixture state is available
If a custom-agent fixture is not available in the target environment, the scenario reports a documented skipped/unsupported condition rather than silently passing the check
Failure artifacts make missing profile/agent visibility clear
Focused scenario/fixture tests or documented smoke checks pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Enable Docker execution for canonical scenario
userStories.description: As a Ralph agent, I want the canonical pibo tui:sessions scenario to run in Docker workers so that autonomous implementation validates its actual environment.
acceptanceCriteria: Canonical scenario can target --docker-worker and --workdir
Docker run either passes with mocked provider mode or fails/skips with clear missing-capability diagnostics
Docker artifacts are host-readable and include backend metadata
Documented Docker smoke check or automated test verifies the scenario path
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Document optional real-provider CLI Session UI smoke
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want an optional real-provider smoke scenario so that I can manually validate live provider behavior with safety bounds.
acceptanceCriteria: Document the real-provider variant of the pibo tui:sessions scenario
Real-provider variant requires --real-provider and defaults --max-iterations to 10
Instructions explain provider cost, timeout, idle timeout, stop conditions, and artifact sensitivity
The real-provider smoke is not part of default npm test
Docs/examples are reviewed against implemented command behavior
Typecheck passes
